title: Analytics - Firmware Update Started
scenario: Verify that starting a DFU (firmware update) on a device logs the event and correctly updates Firebase dashboard elements (graph, event counts, device/update details) after a few hours.
steps: Verify that the page loads properly.
Check that default elements are displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Check that additional elements are displayed: Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID.
Start a DFU (firmware update) process on any device.
Check the event count for related elements on the dashboard.
Verify that the event count has increased.
expected: The Firebase dashboard page opens properly and displays all default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) plus Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, and Target Language ID. After a DFU process is started, the event count for related elements increases after a few hours.
